en_title: Xbox Is Unable to Meet Demand for New Consoles, Rethinking Approach to Project Helix
cn_title: 《Project Helix》Xbox因组件短缺无法满足主机需求，重新审视下一代主机策略
subtitle: 危机下的抉择
opus_summary: Xbox因组件短缺无法满足新主机需求，正重新思考Project Helix策略。Game Pass涨价后流失数百万订阅用户，新CEO阿莎·夏尔玛曾问Xbox是否“有救”。

paragraphs.en: Xbox isn't able to keep up with the demand for new consoles as a result of component shortages, which is prompting Microsoft to rethink the strategy for its next console.
paragraphs.cn: 由于组件短缺，Xbox无法满足新主机的需求，这促使微软重新思考下一代主机的策略。

paragraphs.en: While speaking at Summer Game Fest, Xbox's Chief Strategy Officer, Matthew Ball, addressed the ongoing situation regarding the AI boom driving up prices on hardware, due to component shortages/price increases. Per GameSpot , Ball noted that the company isn't able to meet demand for new consoles due to the current climate, but it doesn't mean players aren't hungry to purchase Xbox consoles.
paragraphs.cn: 在夏日游戏节上，Xbox首席战略官Matthew Ball谈到了当前AI热潮因组件短缺/价格上涨推高硬件价格的情况。据GameSpot报道，Ball指出，由于当前环境，公司无法满足新主机的需求，但这并不意味着玩家没有购买Xbox主机的意愿。

paragraphs.en: “We are producing them as quickly as possible. These is a severe limitation to how quickly we can do that, but it’s not a question of appetite,” he said. “That is a prilvege as a company. It is a challenge for us to figure out.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在尽可能快地生产。但生产速度受到严重限制，这不是意愿问题，」他说，「作为一家公司，这是一种荣幸。对我们来说，这是一个需要解决的挑战。」

paragraphs.en: Naturally, Ball was also asked about what this means for the next Xbox console, Project Helix. There has been a lot of speculation about what it will cost, especially with components becoming increasingly expensive. He noted that the "crisis is not yet getting better" and that it is forcing them to rethink their strategy with Helix.
paragraphs.cn: 自然，Ball也被问及这对下一代Xbox主机Project Helix意味着什么。外界对其成本有很多猜测，尤其是组件越来越贵。他指出「危机尚未好转」，这迫使他们重新思考Project Helix的策略。

paragraphs.en: “We are working very hard to rethink everything that we can about Helix, which is a console we are committed to shipping," he said. “We are very cognizant of the ways in which we need the change as a company to make sure it is affordable, to make sure that it’s flexible. We are working hard to rethinking what that console model can look like, not in an exclusionary way, but in an additive way, so that as we take a look at this crisis, which may have acute effects for 2-2.5 years.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在努力重新思考关于Project Helix的一切，这是一款我们承诺会推出的主机，」他说，「我们非常清楚公司需要做出哪些改变，以确保它价格合理、灵活多变。我们正在努力重新构想这款主机的形态，不是排他性的，而是附加性的，以便应对这场可能持续2到2.5年的危机。」

paragraphs.en: Ball went on to note that he also wants to find a healthy balance, so that Xbox can create strong and enticing value for newcomers, but also make sure current players feel rewarded for their loyalty.
paragraphs.cn: Ball还指出，他希望找到一个健康的平衡点，让Xbox既能为新玩家创造强大诱人的价值，又能让现有玩家感受到忠诚的回报。

paragraphs.en: “We are working very hard to figure out the best way to navigate it or a way that works for everyone, that does not ask too much from players,” he said. “We also have tens of millions of people who we ask to spend $500 which is still an incredible sum of money. Those people that we asked to buy a console years ago, we still have an obligation to them to meet their expectations and to have them feel rewarded for which platform they chose.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在努力找出最佳应对方式，或者一种对所有人都有效、不会对玩家要求过多的方式，」他说，「我们还有数千万玩家，他们花了500美元(约合人民币3580元)，这仍然是一笔巨款。那些多年前我们请他们购买主机的玩家，我们仍有义务满足他们的期望，让他们觉得自己选择的平台物有所值。」

paragraphs.en: Ball was also extremely transparent about the state of Xbox, noting that Game Pass lost "millions" of subscribers when the service raised prices last year. He went on to reveal that Xbox's new CEO, Asha Sharma, bluntly asked him if Xbox was "fixable" when he was brought into the company earlier this year. Ball expressed optimism to her, noting that he believes they can improve the situation.
paragraphs.cn: Ball还非常坦诚地谈到了Xbox的现状，指出Game Pass去年涨价后流失了「数百万」订阅用户。他接着透露，Xbox新任CEOAsha Sharma在今年早些时候他加入公司时，直截了当地问他Xbox是否「有救」。Ball对她表达了乐观态度，表示他相信他们能够改善局面。

paragraphs.en: It'll be an uphill battle for Xbox going forward as it attempts to define a path for exclusivity , works to win over players after painful price increases, and much more. On the upside, Xbox has a lot of promising games on the horizon with Gears of War: E-Day , Halo: Campaign Evolved , and Fable .
paragraphs.cn: 对Xbox来说，未来将是一场艰苦的战斗：它需要明确独占路线，在痛苦的涨价后赢回玩家，等等。好消息是，Xbox即将推出许多有前途的游戏，包括《战争机器：事变日》、《光环：战役进化》和《神鬼寓言》。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
